title: NVIDIA's AI Engineers: Agent Inference at Planetary Scale and Speed of Light — Nader Khalil (Brev), Kyle Kranen (Dynamo)
description: NVIDIA welcomes AI Engineers with a special pre GTC episode!
summary_ko: NVIDIA가 GTC 이벤트를 앞두고 AI 엔지니어들을 위한 특별 에피소드를 공개했습니다. 행성 규모와 광속의 에이전트 추론 기술에 대해 다루고 있습니다. Brev와 Dynamo의 전문가들이 참여하여 AI 인프라의 미래를 논의합니다.
summary_en: NVIDIA released a special pre-GTC episode welcoming AI Engineers to discuss advanced AI infrastructure. The episode covers agent inference technology at planetary scale and speed of light capabilities. Experts from Brev and Dynamo participated to discuss the future of AI infrastructure development.
so_what_ko: 대규모 AI 추론 기술의 발전은 D2C 기업들이 실시간 개인화와 고속 의사결정을 통해 고객 경험을 혁신할 수 있는 기회를 제공합니다.
so_what_en: Advances in large-scale AI inference technology present opportunities for D2C companies to revolutionize customer experiences through real-time personalization and high-speed decision making.
key_points: NVIDIA's focus on AI engineering at planetary scale
Agent inference technology advancement
Industry collaboration with Brev and Dynamo experts

title: [AINews] Autoresearch: Sparks of Recursive Self Improvement
description: AGI takes another small step forward.
summary_ko: 자율 연구(Autoresearch) 기술이 재귀적 자기개선의 가능성을 보여주고 있습니다. 인공일반지능(AGI) 달성을 향한 작은 진전을 나타내는 기술로 평가받고 있습니다. AI 시스템이 스스로를 개선할 수 있는 능력의 초기 단계를 보여줍니다.
summary_en: Autoresearch technology demonstrates potential for recursive self-improvement capabilities. It represents a small but significant step forward toward achieving Artificial General Intelligence (AGI). The technology shows early-stage abilities for AI systems to improve themselves autonomously.
so_what_ko: 자기개선 AI 기술은 D2C 기업의 마케팅과 고객 서비스가 지속적으로 자동 최적화되는 미래를 암시합니다.
so_what_en: Self-improving AI technology suggests a future where D2C companies' marketing and customer service can continuously auto-optimize without manual intervention.
key_points: Recursive self-improvement in AI systems
Progress toward AGI development
Autonomous system enhancement capabilities

title: GEO hype busted: How it differs (and how it doesn’t) from SEO
description: GEO is flooding media execs’ inboxes. But SEO veterans say these AI visibility services may not be as revolutionary as they seem.
summary_ko: GEO(Generative Engine Optimization)가 미디어 업계에서 화제가 되고 있지만, SEO 전문가들은 이것이 혁신적이지 않다고 평가합니다. AI 가시성 서비스로 마케팅되고 있지만 기존 SEO와 크게 다르지 않다는 지적입니다. 미디어 임원들의 받은편지함에 GEO 관련 제안이 넘쳐나고 있는 상황입니다.
summary_en: GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) is flooding media executives' inboxes but SEO veterans argue it's not as revolutionary as marketed. These AI visibility services are being promoted as innovative but experts say they don't differ significantly from traditional SEO. The hype around GEO may be overblown according to industry veterans.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 GEO 투자 전에 기존 SEO와의 차별점을 명확히 파악하고, 실질적 ROI를 검증해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should clearly understand the differences between GEO and traditional SEO before investing, and verify actual ROI potential.
key_points: GEO marketing surge in media industry
SEO experts question GEO's revolutionary claims
Potential overlap between GEO and traditional SEO methods

title: TikTok after the legal fight and why it’s coming for Meta’s ad dollars
description: With legal issues behind it, TikTok is stepping up marketing and making a stronger play for Meta’s ad budgets.
summary_ko: 틱톡이 법적 문제를 해결한 후 마케팅을 강화하고 메타의 광고 예산을 적극 유치하고 있습니다. 법적 불확실성이 해소되면서 틱톡의 광고 플랫폼 경쟁력이 강화되었습니다. 메타와의 광고 시장 경쟁이 더욱 치열해질 전망입니다.
summary_en: TikTok is intensifying its marketing efforts and aggressively pursuing Meta's advertising budgets after resolving legal issues. The platform's competitive position has strengthened with legal uncertainties behind it. The competition for advertising market share between TikTok and Meta is expected to intensify.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 틱톡의 강화된 광고 서비스를 활용하여 메타 대비 더 나은 광고 효율을 얻을 기회를 모색해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should explore opportunities to leverage TikTok's enhanced advertising services for potentially better ad efficiency compared to Meta.
key_points: TikTok's legal issues resolved, enabling marketing expansion
Direct competition with Meta for advertising budgets
Enhanced competitive positioning in social media advertising

title: Ad Tech Briefing: Embattled, embittered and determined
description: Company executives come out swinging as the markets issue their judgements on Wall Street pitches.
summary_ko: 애드테크 기업 임원들이 월가의 평가에 맞서 적극적으로 반박하고 있습니다. 시장의 혹독한 평가 속에서도 업계 리더들은 단호한 의지를 보이고 있습니다. 애드테크 업계가 도전적인 상황에서도 투자자들을 설득하기 위해 노력하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Ad tech company executives are fighting back against Wall Street's harsh judgments on their market pitches. Industry leaders remain determined despite challenging market evaluations and investor skepticism. The ad tech sector is actively working to convince investors of their value propositions amid difficult market conditions.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 애드테크 업계의 불확실성을 활용하여 더 유리한 광고 파트너십과 가격 조건을 협상할 수 있는 기회를 찾아야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies should leverage the ad tech industry's uncertainty to negotiate more favorable advertising partnerships and pricing terms.
key_points: Ad tech executives defending against Wall Street criticism
Industry determination despite market challenges
Ongoing efforts to prove value to investors

title: Target CEO says ‘busy families’ will be company’s focus as it seeks growth
description: The company is making tweaks to departments like food and baby, as well as services like same-day delivery.
summary_ko: 타겟이 성장 전략으로 '바쁜 가족'을 핵심 타겟으로 설정했습니다. 음식과 육아용품 부서를 개선하고 당일 배송 서비스를 강화하고 있습니다. 가족 중심의 맞춤형 서비스와 편의성 향상에 집중하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Target has identified 'busy families' as its key focus for growth strategy. The company is enhancing departments like food and baby products while strengthening same-day delivery services. They are concentrating on family-centered customized services and convenience improvements.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 바쁜 가족을 위한 편의성과 당일 배송 같은 빠른 서비스가 핵심 차별화 요소임을 인식해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should recognize that convenience and rapid services like same-day delivery are key differentiators for busy families.
key_points: Target focuses on 'busy families' as primary growth segment
Enhancement of food and baby product departments
Strengthening same-day delivery services
Family-centered service improvements

title: OpenAI is b building the ad tech stack it’s currently borrowing
description: Companies don’t build out an internal ads org – let alone pay up to $385,000 to do it – if they’re planning to rely on outside vendors forever.
summary_ko: OpenAI가 현재 외부 업체에 의존하던 광고 기술 스택을 내부적으로 구축하고 있습니다. 내부 광고 조직 구축에 최대 38만 5천 달러를 투자하고 있습니다. 이는 장기적으로 외부 벤더 의존도를 줄이려는 전략으로 보입니다.
summary_en: OpenAI is building its own ad tech stack internally instead of relying on external vendors. The company is investing up to $385,000 to build an internal advertising organization. This appears to be a long-term strategy to reduce dependence on outside vendors.
so_what_ko: AI 플랫폼들이 광고 기술을 내재화하면서 D2C 브랜드들의 AI 마케팅 전략과 광고 투자 방향이 변화할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: As AI platforms internalize ad tech capabilities, D2C brands may need to adapt their AI marketing strategies and advertising investment approaches.
key_points: OpenAI building internal ad tech stack
Investment of up to $385,000 for internal ads organization
Strategy to reduce reliance on external vendors
Shift from borrowed to owned advertising technology

title: Today's NYT Mini Crossword Answers for Tuesday, March 10
description: Here are the answers for The New York Times Mini Crossword for March 10.
summary_ko: 뉴욕타임스 미니 크로스워드 퍼즐의 3월 10일 화요일 정답을 제공하는 기사입니다. CNET에서 게임 관련 콘텐츠로 제공되었습니다. D2C나 AI 상거래와는 직접적인 관련성이 없는 콘텐츠입니다.
summary_en: This article provides answers for The New York Times Mini Crossword puzzle for Tuesday, March 10. It was published by CNET as gaming-related content. The content has no direct relevance to D2C or AI commerce.
so_what_ko: 이 콘텐츠는 D2C 비즈니스와 직접적인 연관성이 없어 비즈니스 인사이트를 제공하지 않습니다.
so_what_en: This content lacks direct relevance to D2C business and provides no actionable business insights.
key_points: NYT Mini Crossword answers for March 10
Gaming-related content from CNET
No business or commerce relevance

title: Studies Reveal AI Citation Clues
description:
Generative AI platforms offer no guidelines on how to appear in their answers. We're left with independent research.
The post Studies Reveal AI Citation Clues appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.
summary_ko: 생성형 AI 플랫폼에서 인용되는 방법에 대한 가이드라인이 없어 독립적인 연구에 의존하고 있습니다. AI 답변에 나타나는 방법에 대한 단서를 연구를 통해 파악하고 있습니다. AI 플랫폼의 인용 패턴을 이해하는 것이 중요해지고 있습니다.
summary_en: Generative AI platforms provide no guidelines on how to appear in their citations, leaving businesses to rely on independent research. Studies are revealing clues about how to appear in AI-generated answers. Understanding AI citation patterns is becoming increasingly important.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 AI 검색 결과에 노출되기 위해 독립적인 연구와 실험을 통해 최적화 전략을 개발해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must develop optimization strategies through independent research and experimentation to appear in AI search results and citations.
key_points: No official guidelines for AI platform citations
Independent research needed to understand AI citation patterns
Studies revealing clues for AI visibility
Growing importance of AI search optimization

title: Target to open 2,000th store
description: The North Carolina location “represents the future of Target’s elevated guest experience” and is part of the retailer’s plan to open over 30 stores this year.
summary_ko: 타겟이 노스캐롤라이나에 2,000번째 매장을 오픈했습니다. 이 매장은 '타겟의 향상된 고객 경험의 미래'를 대표한다고 발표했습니다. 올해 30개 이상의 신규 매장 오픈 계획의 일환입니다.
summary_en: Target opened its 2,000th store location in North Carolina. The location represents 'the future of Target's elevated guest experience' according to the company. This opening is part of Target's plan to open over 30 stores this year.
so_what_ko: 대형 리테일러의 지속적인 오프라인 확장은 D2C 브랜드들도 옴니채널 전략과 물리적 접점의 중요성을 재고해야 함을 시사합니다.
so_what_en: Major retailers' continued offline expansion suggests D2C brands should reconsider the importance of omnichannel strategies and physical touchpoints.
key_points: Target's 2,000th store milestone in North Carolina
Store represents future of elevated guest experience
Part of plan to open over 30 stores this year
Continued investment in physical retail presence

title: Saks Global announces 15 more store closures, expands vendor base to 500
description: Three Neiman Marcus and 12 Saks Fifth Avenue locations will shutter. The luxury company, which is in bankruptcy court, said its fleet is likely now set.
summary_ko: 럭셔리 리테일러 Saks Global이 파산 절차 중에 15개 매장을 추가로 폐점한다고 발표했습니다. Neiman Marcus 3곳과 Saks Fifth Avenue 12곳이 문을 닫을 예정입니다. 동시에 벤더 기반을 500개로 확장하여 매장 축소와 공급업체 다각화를 동시에 진행하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Luxury retailer Saks Global announced 15 additional store closures while in bankruptcy proceedings. Three Neiman Marcus and 12 Saks Fifth Avenue locations will shutter. The company is simultaneously expanding its vendor base to 500 suppliers, pursuing store reduction alongside supplier diversification.
so_what_ko: 럭셔리 브랜드도 오프라인 매장 최적화와 벤더 포트폴리오 다각화가 생존 전략의 핵심임을 보여줍니다.
so_what_en: Even luxury brands must optimize physical footprints while diversifying vendor portfolios as key survival strategies.
key_points: 15 store closures across Neiman Marcus and Saks Fifth Avenue
Company undergoing bankruptcy proceedings
Vendor base expansion to 500 suppliers
Strategic shift from physical presence to supplier diversification

title: Target debuts Free People intimates assortment
description: The mass retailer is selling Intimately FP in select stores and online with a selection of exclusive offerings.
summary_ko: Target이 Free People의 란제리 라인 'Intimately FP'를 선별된 매장과 온라인에서 판매를 시작했습니다. 이번 협업에는 독점 제품들도 포함되어 있습니다. 대중 소매업체가 프리미엄 브랜드와의 파트너십을 통해 상품 라인업을 확장하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Target has launched Free People's intimates line 'Intimately FP' in select stores and online. The collaboration includes exclusive product offerings. The mass retailer is expanding its product lineup through premium brand partnerships.
so_what_ko: 대중 브랜드와 프리미엄 브랜드 간 협업이 고객층 확장과 차별화된 상품 구성의 효과적 전략임을 보여줍니다.
so_what_en: Collaborations between mass and premium brands prove effective for customer base expansion and differentiated product assortment.
key_points: Target launches Free People intimates collection
Available in select stores and online
Includes exclusive product offerings
Mass retailer partnering with premium brand

title: Primark is retail’s ‘best kept secret.’ It’s ready to move beyond that.
description: The fashion retailer has a new CEO, is expanding in the U.S. and will soon open a flagship in New York City. It just wants you to know it exists.
summary_ko: 패션 리테일러 Primark이 새로운 CEO를 임명하고 미국 시장 확장을 추진하고 있습니다. 뉴욕시에 플래그십 스토어를 곧 오픈할 예정입니다. 브랜드 인지도 향상을 통해 '잘 알려지지 않은 비밀'에서 벗어나려고 합니다.
summary_en: Fashion retailer Primark has appointed a new CEO and is expanding in the US market. The company will soon open a flagship store in New York City. Primark aims to move beyond being retail's 'best kept secret' through improved brand awareness.
so_what_ko: 브랜드 인지도가 낮은 해외 진출 브랜드는 플래그십 스토어와 전략적 마케팅을 통한 인지도 개선이 필수입니다.
so_what_en: International brands with low awareness must prioritize flagship stores and strategic marketing for brand recognition improvement.
key_points: New CEO appointment for US expansion
Flagship store opening in New York City
Focus on improving brand awareness
Moving beyond 'best kept secret' status

title: CBP says it can’t comply with court order for tariff refunds yet
description: The agency is confident it can implement a process that streamlines returns for now-defunct Trump administration levies in 45 days, according to a court filing.
summary_ko: 미국 세관국경보호청(CBP)이 트럼프 행정부 시절 관세 환급에 관한 법원 명령을 아직 이행할 수 없다고 발표했습니다. 법원 서류에 따르면 45일 내에 환급 절차를 간소화할 수 있을 것으로 확신한다고 밝혔습니다. 이는 현재 폐지된 관세 징수분에 대한 환급 처리 관련 사안입니다.
summary_en: US Customs and Border Protection (CBP) announced it cannot yet comply with court orders for tariff refunds from the Trump administration. According to court filings, the agency is confident it can implement a streamlined refund process within 45 days. This relates to refund processing for now-defunct tariff collections.
so_what_ko: 관세 정책 변화와 환급 처리 지연은 글로벌 D2C 브랜드의 비용 구조와 현금 흐름에 직접적 영향을 미칩니다.
so_what_en: Tariff policy changes and refund processing delays directly impact global D2C brands' cost structures and cash flows.
key_points: CBP cannot yet comply with tariff refund court orders
45-day timeline for implementing streamlined process
Related to Trump administration tariff refunds
Affects now-defunct levy collections

title: Logistics.com launches an updated transportation procurement platform
description:
Logistics.com has launched OptiBid 3, the latest version of its transportation procurement platform that it designed to help shippers manage freight bidding and contract negotiations with carriers. The Burlington-based logistics technology provider said the updated platform allows companies to conduct transportation procurement events across multiple freight modes while improving data analysis and bid evaluation. Logistics.com […]
The post Logistics.com launches an updated transportation procurement platform appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: 물류 기술 제공업체 Logistics.com이 운송 조달 플랫폼 OptiBid 3을 출시했습니다. 이 플랫폼은 운송업체와의 화물 입찰 및 계약 협상 관리를 돕도록 설계되었습니다. 여러 화물 운송 모드에서 조달 이벤트를 진행하고 데이터 분석과 입찰 평가를 개선할 수 있습니다.
summary_en: Logistics technology provider Logistics.com launched OptiBid 3, its updated transportation procurement platform. The platform is designed to help shippers manage freight bidding and contract negotiations with carriers. It enables companies to conduct procurement events across multiple freight modes while improving data analysis and bid evaluation.
so_what_ko: 고도화된 물류 조달 플랫폼은 D2C 브랜드의 운송비 최적화와 공급망 효율성 개선에 핵심적 역할을 합니다.
so_what_en: Advanced logistics procurement platforms play a crucial role in D2C brands' shipping cost optimization and supply chain efficiency improvement.
key_points: OptiBid 3 transportation procurement platform launch
Manages freight bidding and carrier negotiations
Supports multiple freight modes
Enhanced data analysis and bid evaluation capabilities
